name: Berserker
bio: A blood-drenched juggernaut who lives for the scream of metal and the snap of bone.

skills.name: Rampage
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (140% of Attack Damage + 150), and heal for (12% of Attack Damage + 60).

skills.name: Frenzy
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 90% of Attack Damage, then permanently additively increase Attack Damage by 16%.

skills.name: Berserk
skills.description: Permanently halve Armor and Magic Resist, double Attack Damage (non-stackable), then deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 80% of Attack Damage.

skills.name: Empty Slot
skills.description: This character has no fourth ability.

ultimate.name: Execution!
ultimate.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (240% of Attack Damage + 500).
